name: Apple Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Sharp processed American cheese, shredded (8 oz)
2 cups Tart apples, cored, pared, and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions; drain.
2. In a saucepan, melt 6 tablespoons butter or margarine over low heat. Blend in flour and 3/4 teaspoon salt.
3. Add milk all at once. Cook quickly, stirring constantly until the mixture thickens and bubbles.
4. Add cheese; stir until melted. Stir in tuna, diced apples, and drained macaroni.
5. Transfer the mixture into a 12x7x2 inch baking dish.
6. Combine melted butter with bread crumbs. Sprinkle on top of the casserole.
7. Bake in an oven set to 350°F for 30 minutes, or until apples are tender.
